per_consumer.name: openonco
per_consumer.description: Free public clinical decision-support resource for oncology. First TaskTorrent pilot. Chunks focus on biomarker-actionability records, citation verification, red-flag coverage, and source ingestion. UA + EN.

_note: Manually corrected on 2026-05-01: scripts/build_landing_data.py queries romeo111/OpenOnco for chunk-task issues, but the active issues live in romeo111/task_torrent (#11, #12). Will be auto-overwritten once consumers.yaml or the builder is fixed (see docs/openonco-plugin-handoff-plan.md Step 2).
